Content: What general education requirements do I still need?

Alex, as an AI Academic Advisor, I can outline the General Education requirements for your Computer Science Major, B.S. program. Please note that without a list of your completed courses, I cannot specify exactly which ones you still need, but I can provide the full list of requirements.

Your General Education requirements total 40 credits and include:

*   **Foundations (10 credits):**

    *   ENG 102 - Rhetoric and Composition II (3 credits)
